events.name: King John pardoned him of 100 marks of his father's debt in exchange for speculative fines for favours.
Occupation
events.place: Entered King John's service as temporary custodian of Dover Castle during Hubert de Burgh's absence; he surrendered his son and daughter to the king as hostages.

events.name: offered four palfreys and a falcon for royal confirmation of the manor of Stokes, Norfolk
made an offering for custody of the land and heir of Osbert fitz Hervey
paid £80 on behalf of Isolda Biset for custody of her son William and of one of her manors
offered the king six "beautiful Norwegian hawks" for having his widowed daughter's dower lands and the right to her remarriage
turned against the king, and joined the rebel barons at Stamford
turned against the king, and joined the rebel barons at Stamford
King John ordered that his lands be seized following the defiance of the barons
joined William de Mandeville and Robert Fitzwalter in extending rebel control over East Anglia in 1216 after the landing of King Louis of France
two of his knights went before the royal agents, seeking his ransom
present at the great council that issued regulations restricting use of the great seal during King Henry III's minority

zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk於大約1160年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham16歲，母親Alice de Senlis22歲。他和Isabel Gressenhall至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他於1215年登記服兵役。他於1214年被列為on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.。他去世於1221年1月25日之前在巴勒斯坦，埋葬在英國素福爾可亨廷費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk于大约1160年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham16岁，母亲Alice de Senlis22岁。他和Isabel Gressenhall至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他于1215年登记服兵役。他于1214年被列为on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.。他去世于1221年1月25日之前在巴勒斯坦，埋葬在英国素福爾可亨廷費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk was born about 1160, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham, was 16 and his mother, Alice de Senlis, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Isabel Gressenhall. He registered for military service in 1215. In 1214, his occupation is listed as on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.. He died before 25 January 1221, in Palestine, and was buried in Huntingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk est né environ 1160, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Alice de Senlis, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Isabel Gressenhall. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1215. En 1214, sa profession de son indiquée est on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.. Il est décédé avant 25 janvier 1221, à Palestine, et a été enterré à Huntingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk um 1160 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham 16 und seine Mutter Alice de Senlis 22. Er hatte mit Isabel Gressenhall mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1215 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1214 ist sein Beruf als on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church. aufgeführt. Er starb vor 25. Januar 1221 in Palästina und wurde in Huntingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk è nato il circa 1160 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Senlis, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Isabel Gressenhall. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1215. Nel 1214, la sua occupazione è indicata come on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.. Morì prima del 25 gennaio 1221, nel Palestina, e fu sepolto a Huntingfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolkが約1160年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenhamは16歳，母Alice de Senlisは22歳であった。彼はIsabel Gressenhallとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1215年に兵役登録をした。1214年，職業はon his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.と記録されている。彼は1221年1月25日以前にパレスチナで死去し，イギリススフォルクハンティングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk(이)가 대략 1160년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Senlis(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Isabel Gressenhall(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1215년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1214년, 그의 직업은 on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.이었다. 그는 1221년 1월 25일 이전 팔레스타인에서 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 헌틴그필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk nasceu aproximadamente 1160, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Senlis, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Isabel Gressenhall. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1215. Em 1214, sua profissão aparece como on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.. Ele faleceu antes 25 de janeiro de 1221, em Palestina, e foi sepultado em Huntingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ro.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: линколн алл сеинц, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk родился около 1160 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Senlis, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Isabel Gressenhall. В 1215 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1214 годуработал по профессии on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church. Он умер перед 25 январь 1221 г. в местности Палестина и был похоронен в местности хантингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, United K: Lincoln All Saints, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Huntingfield Sheriff of Norfolk nació aproximadamente 1160, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Roger de Huntingfield Lord of East Bradenham, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Alice de Senlis, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Isabel Gressenhall. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1215. En 1214, su ocupación registrada era on his return from france he witnessed the king's grant of liberties to the english church.. Murió antes de 25 de enero de 1221, en Palestina, y fue sepultado en Huntingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
